overview: A high-energy, conversion-focused rental property website for PSR Rental in Jodhpur. Designed to feel like a live rental platform — fast, dynamic, and built to turn visitors into instant WhatsApp and call inquiries.
features: Animated hero with slideshow background and dual WhatsApp/Call CTAs
Interactive property search with tabs for Rent Home, PG/Room, Office, Shop
Smart category cards with hover animations
App-like live property feed with 'Just Added' badges
Why Choose Us section with dynamic icons
Sticky floating WhatsApp and Call buttons
